zh.lifeSummary: 當William Coolidge於1563年出生在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾可頓哈姆時，他的父親Simeon Coolidge31歲，母親Agnes Kingston29歲。他於1588年6月23日與Margaret Mayse在英國坎布利其爾可頓哈姆結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1618年10月21日在他的家鄉享年55歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾可頓哈姆哥吉拉 沙智 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Coolidge
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: probably an occupational name for acollege servant or someone with some other association with auniversity college, for example a tenant farmer who farmed one of themany farms in England known as College Farm, most of which are or wereowned by university colleges.

variants.name: Colledge
meanings: English (Midlands and northern England): habitational name from Colwich in Staffordshire, named from Old English col ‘(char)coal’ + wīc ‘building’. The name has become associated with the familiar word college.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Coolidge was born in 1563, in Cottenham, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Simeon Coolidge, was 31 and his mother, Agnes Kingston, was 29. He married Margaret Mayse on 23 June 1588, in Cottenham, Cambridgeshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 7 daughters. He died on 21 October 1618, in his hometown, at the age of 55, and was buried in All Saints Church, Cottenham, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom.

Il a épousé Margaret Mayse le 23 juin 1588, à Cottenham, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé le 21 octobre 1618, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à All Saints Church, Cottenham, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Lui sposato Margaret Mayse il 23 giugno 1588, nel Cottenham, Cambridgeshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 7 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: William Coolidgeが1563年にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアコッテンハムで生まれた時，父Simeon Coolidgeは31歳，母Agnes Kingstonは29歳であった。1588年6月23日にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアコッテンハムでMargaret Mayseと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1618年10月21日に故郷で55歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアコッテンハムアル サインツ チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.All Saints' Church, Cottenham, South Cam: 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 컷함 앨 세인츠 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: William Coolidge(이)가 1563년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 컷함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Simeon Coolidge(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Kingston(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1588년 6월 23일 영국 캄브리지실르 컷함에서 Margaret Mayse(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1618년 10월 21일 그의 고향에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 컷함 앨 세인츠 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Coolidge nasceu em 1563, em Cottenham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Simeon Coolidge, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Kingston, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Mayse em 23 de junho de 1588, em Cottenham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 21 de outubro de 1618, em sua cidade natal, com 55 anos, e foi sepultado em All Saints Church, Cottenham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.All Saints' Church, Cottenham, South Cam: алл сеинц чурч, коттенам, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Coolidge родился в 1563 г. в местности коттенам, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Simeon Coolidge было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Agnes Kingston, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Mayse 23 июня 1588 г. в местности коттенам, камбриджешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Он умер 21 октября 1618 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности алл сеинц чурч, коттенам, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания.
